goal: 批次E2-fixup: 修复剩余 9 个 ESLint warnings（logger.ts + test files + VideoChat）

coverage_checklist.logger_console_allowed: assert: logger.ts 中使用 eslint-disable 允许 console 调用
coverage_checklist.ai_test_any_fixed: assert: ai.test.ts 第97行 no-explicit-any 已修复
coverage_checklist.videochat_console_fixed: assert: VideoChat.tsx 第162行 console.log 已替换或添加 eslint-disable
coverage_checklist.vision_test_any_fixed: assert: vision-pipeline.test.ts 中 as any 已替换为具体类型或 eslint-disable
coverage_checklist.lint_zero_warnings: assert: bun run lint 返回 0 errors 0 warnings
